decisions.decision: Chopp algorithm allows up to 20% deficit
decisions.rationale: User specified rounding down is acceptable within 20% margin

decisions.decision: Bolao shows paid tickets publicly, pending only to ticket owner
decisions.rationale: User wanted only paid tickets visible in grid counts

decisions.decision: Activities keep showing all checkins regardless of payment
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested this distinction from bolao

decisions.decision: Vercel deploys from copa-churrasco1 repo (not copa-churrasco)
